title: ROPE model manifest envelope
description: Top-level, kind-agnostic fields of a per-model model_manifest.json. Validate this against the manifest's top-level fields; validate manifest[manifest.kind] separately against the matching schemas/kinds/<kind>.schema.json.

validated.description: Whether this model has been validated against a rope-registry validation suite. Set manually by a human after reviewing the full validation_report.json (including plots) — never written automatically by any benchmarking tool. If true, `validation` must be present (see the conditional below).

suite_content_version.description: The content_version (see validation-suite.schema.json) of the suite this model was validated against. Compare against the registry's current suite content_version to detect staleness; only meaningful when compared against a suite sharing the same schema_version.

report_file.description: Relative filename of the validation_report.json artifact, living alongside this model's other exported artifacts (per docs/model-registry.md's flat exported_dir layout). Plot images referenced within that report live under a plots/ subfolder by convention.

summary.description: Generic named-scalar map for quick human/CI scanning, e.g. {"rmse_timeseries_case_003": 4.8e-13}. Key names are check-id/case-id-dependent by convention, not schema-enforced.
